---
name: Bug Report
description: Use this template to report a bug.
title: "[BUG]: "
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ## Description
        Please describe the bug in detail.

        ## Reproduction Steps
        1. Step one
        2. Step two
        3. Step three

        ## Expected Behavior
        What did you expect to happen?

        ## Additional Context
        Add any other context about the problem here.
---
